heading: Omitted
label: 292, 293 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 292 and 293, relating to Territory of Alaska, were omitted in view of admission of Alaska into the Union.Section 292, , , provided for manufacture and sale of intoxicating liquors.act Apr. 13, 1934, ch. 119, § 248 Stat. 583Section 293, , , ratified and approved act to create board of liquor control, and prescribed penalties for violation of rules and regulations of the board.act Apr. 13, 1934, ch. 119, § 348 Stat. 584
